title: piddingtonia nummularia
intro: Piddingtonia nummularia, also known as the "Australian coin plant," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Piddingtonia nummularia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
